   headers: h
 });
}
__name(mergeHeadersIntoResponse, "mergeHeadersIntoResponse");
function baseHeaders(requestId) {
 return {
   "X-Request-ID": requestId,
   "X-Content-Type-Options": "nosniff",
   "Referrer-Policy": "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
 };
}
__name(baseHeaders, "baseHeaders");
function htmlHeadersViz(requestId) {
 return {
   ...baseHeaders(requestId),
   "Content-Security-Policy": "default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:;"
 };
}
__name(htmlHeadersViz, "htmlHeadersViz");
function getClientIp(request) {
 return request.headers.get("CF-Connecting-IP") || request.headers.get("X-Forwarded-For")?.split(",")[0]?.trim() || "unknown";
}
__name(getClientIp, "getClientIp");
async function checkWriteRateLimit(env, ip, requestId) {
 const raw = env.RATE_LIMIT_POST_PER_MIN;
 const max = raw === void 0 || raw === "" ? 240 : Number(raw);
 if (!Number.isFinite(max) || max <= 0) return null;
 const bucket = Math.floor(Date.now() / 6e4);
 const key = `rl:hubs:write:${ip}:${bucket}`;
 const curRaw = await env.K4_HUBS.get(key);
 const n = curRaw ? parseInt(curRaw, 10) : 0;
 if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n >= max) {
   return json(
     {
       error: { code: "RATE_LIMITED", message: "Too many write requests from this client" },
       requestId,
       timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
     },
     429,
     { "Retry-After": "60", "X-Request-ID": requestId }
   );
 }
 await env.K4_HUBS.put(key, String(n + 1), { expirationTtl: 120 });
 return null;
}
__name(checkWriteRateLimit, "checkWriteRateLimit");


// src/auth.js
function checkWriteAuth(request, env, requestId) {
 const secret = env.HUBS_WRITE_TOKEN;
 if (secret == null || String(secret) === "") return null;
 const auth = request.headers.get("Authorization");
 const x = request.headers.get("X-P31-Token");
 const bearer = auth?.startsWith("Bearer ") ? auth.slice(7).trim() : null;
 const tok = bearer || x?.trim();
 if (tok !== String(secret)) {
   return err("Unauthorized", 401, { code: "UNAUTHORIZED", requestId });
 }
 return null;
}
__name(checkWriteAuth, "checkWriteAuth");


// src/index.js
function withBase(res, requestId) {
 return mergeHeadersIntoResponse(res, baseHeaders(requestId));
}
__name(withBase, "withBase");
async function gateWrite(request, env, requestId) {
 const denied = checkWriteAuth(request, env, requestId);
 if (denied) return denied;
 return await checkWriteRateLimit(env, getClientIp(request), requestId);
}
__name(gateWrite, "gateWrite");
var index_default = {
 /**
  * @param {Request} request
  * @param {Record<string, unknown>} env
  */
 /**
  * @param {Request} request
  * @param {Record<string, unknown>} env
  * @param {{ waitUntil?: (p: Promise<unknown>) => void }} [executionCtx]
  */
 async fetch(request, env, executionCtx) {
   const requestId = crypto.randomUUID();
   if (request.method === "OPTIONS") {
     return new Response(null, {
       status: 204,
       headers: {
         ...CORS_HEADERS,
         ...baseHeaders(requestId),
         "Access-Control-Max-Age": "86400"
       }
     });
   }
   const allowed = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set(["GET", "POST", "DELETE"]);
   if (!allowed.has(request.method)) {
     return withBase(err("Method not allowed", 405, { code: "METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED", requestId }), requestId);
   }
   const url = new URL(request.url);
   const path = url.pathname.replace(/\/$/, "") || "/";
   const method = request.method;
   const ctx = { requestId };
   try {
     if (path === "/" && method === "GET") {
       return withBase(
         new Response(
           `<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="utf-8"/><title>k4-hubs</title></head><body style="font-family:system-ui;padding:2rem;background:#0c1222;color:#cbd5e1"><h1 style="color:#4ecdc4">k4-hubs</h1><p>Life-context K\u2084 meshes \u2014 <a href="/viz" style="color:#4ecdc4">Viz</a> \xB7 <a href="/api" style="color:#4ecdc4">API</a></p></body></html>`,
           { headers: { "Content-Type": "text/html;charset=UTF-8", "Cache-Control": "no-store" } }
         ),
         requestId
       );
     }
     if (path === "/viz" && method === "GET") {
       const hubId = url.searchParams.get("id");
       const h = htmlHeadersViz(requestId);
       if (hubId) {
         return withBase(hubVizHubResponse(hubId, h), requestId);
       }
       return withBase(hubVizListResponse(h), requestId);
     }
     if (path === "/api" && method === "GET") return withBase(hubRouteIndex(ctx), requestId);
     if (path === "/api/health" && method === "GET") return withBase(await hubHealthGet(env, ctx), requestId);
     if (path === "/api/dockback" && method === "GET") {
       const ref = url.searchParams.get("ref");
       return withBase(await hubDockbackGet(env, ref, ctx), requestId);
     }
     if (path === "/api/hubs" && method === "GET") {
       return withBase(await hubsListGet(env, request.url, ctx), requestId);
     }
     if (path === "/api/hubs" && method === "POST") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(await hubsCreatePost(env, request, ctx), requestId);
     }
     const meshM = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)\/mesh$/);
     if (meshM && method === "GET") {
       return withBase(await hubMeshGet(env, meshM[1], request.url, ctx), requestId);
     }
     const hubIdOnly = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)$/);
     if (hubIdOnly && method === "DELETE") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(await hubDeleteDelete(env, hubIdOnly[1], ctx), requestId);
     }
     const bindM = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)\/dock\/([abcd])\/bind$/);
     if (bindM && method === "POST") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(await hubDockBindPost(env, request, bindM[1], bindM[2], ctx), requestId);
     }
     const unbindM = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)\/dock\/([abcd])\/unbind$/);
     if (unbindM && method === "POST") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(await hubDockUnbindPost(env, unbindM[1], unbindM[2], ctx), requestId);
     }
     const presM = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)\/presence\/([abcd])$/);
     if (presM && method === "POST") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(await hubPresencePost(env, request, presM[1], presM[2], ctx), requestId);
     }
     const pingM = path.match(/^\/api\/hubs\/([^/]+)\/ping\/(\w+)\/(\w+)$/);
     if (pingM && method === "POST") {
       const gate = await gateWrite(request, env, requestId);
       if (gate) return withBase(gate, requestId);
       return withBase(
         await hubPingPost(env, request, pingM[1], pingM[2], pingM[3], ctx, executionCtx ?? null),
         requestId
       );
     }
     if (hubIdOnly && method === "GET") {
       return withBase(await hubManifestGet(env, hubIdOnly[1], ctx), requestId);
     }
     return withBase(err("Not found", 404, { code: "NOT_FOUND", requestId }), requestId);
   } catch (e) {
     const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e);
     return withBase(err(msg, 500, { code: "INTERNAL", requestId }), requestId);
   }
 }
};
export {
 index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map


K4-cage

var __defProp = Object.defineProperty;
var __name = (target, value) => __defProp(target, "name", { value, configurable: true });


// ../packages/k4-mesh-core/scopes.js
var PHASE_SIERPINSKI = 4;
var MAX_DEPTH = 5;
var SUB_VERTICES = ["a", "b", "c", "d"];
var FAMILY = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set(["will", "sj", "wj", "christyn"]);
var EDGES_SUB = [
 ["a", "b"],
 ["a", "c"],
 ["a", "d"],
 ["b", "c"],
 ["b", "d"],
 ["c", "d"]
];
function edgeKeySub(v1, v2) {
 return [v1, v2].sort().join("-");
}
__name(edgeKeySub, "edgeKeySub");
function normalizeScopePath(raw) {
 if (raw == null || raw === "") return "";
 let s = String(raw).trim().replace(/^\/+|\/+$/g, "");
 if (s === "root" || s === "family") return "";
 if (s === "personal") return "personal";
 const parts = s.split("/").filter(Boolean);
 if (parts.length === 0) return "";
 if (parts.length > MAX_DEPTH) return null;
 if (parts[0] === "personal") {
   if (parts.length > 1) return null;
   return "personal";
 }
 if (!FAMILY.has(parts[0])) return null;
 for (let i = 1; i < parts.length; i++) {
   if (!SUB_VERTICES.includes(parts[i])) return null;
 }
 return parts.join("/");
}
__name(normalizeScopePath, "normalizeScopePath");
function scopeDepth(path) {
 if (path === "" || path === null) return 0;
 if (path === "personal") return 1;
 return path.split("/").length;
}
__name(scopeDepth, "scopeDepth");
function verticesForScope(path) {
 if (path === "" || path === null) {
   return { labels: ["will", "sj", "wj", "christyn"], mode: "family" };
 }
 return { labels: [...SUB_VERTICES], mode: path === "personal" ? "personal" : "nested" };
}
__name(verticesForScope, "verticesForScope");
function edgesForScope(path) {
 if (path === "" || path === null) {
   return [
     ["will", "sj"],
     ["will", "wj"],
     ["will", "christyn"],
     ["sj", "wj"],
     ["sj", "christyn"],
     ["wj", "christyn"]
   ];
 }
 return EDGES_SUB;
}
__name(edgesForScope, "edgesForScope");
function scopedVertexKey(scopePath, id) {
 const s = scopePath === "" ? "root" : scopePath.replace(/\//g, ":");
 return `k4s:${s}:v:${id}`;
}
__name(scopedVertexKey, "scopedVertexKey");
function scopedEdgeKey(scopePath, v1, v2) {
 const s = scopePath === "" ? "root" : scopePath.replace(/\//g, ":");
 const ek = edgeKeySub(v1, v2);
 return `k4s:${s}:e:${ek}`;
}
__name(scopedEdgeKey, "scopedEdgeKey");
function registryKey() {
 return "meta:scope_registry";
}
__name(registryKey, "registryKey");
async function registerScope(env, scopePath) {
 const key = registryKey();
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(key);
 const set = raw ? new Set(JSON.parse(raw)) : /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();
 const tag = scopePath === "" ? "root" : scopePath;
 if (!set.has(tag)) {
   set.add(tag);
   await env.K4_MESH.put(key, JSON.stringify([...set].sort()));
 }
}
__name(registerScope, "registerScope");
async function getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, { legacyFamily = false } = {}) {
 const sk = scopedVertexKey(scopePath, id);
 let raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(sk);
 if (!raw && legacyFamily && scopePath === "") {
   raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(`vertex:${id}`);
 }
 const { labels, mode } = verticesForScope(scopePath);
 const defaultName = mode === "family" ? id : id;
 if (!raw) {
   return {
     id,
     name: defaultName,
     scope: scopePath === "" ? "family" : scopePath,
     love: 0,
     status: "offline",
     lastSeen: null,
     heartbeat: null,
     metadata: {}
   };
 }
 return JSON.parse(raw);
}
__name(getVertexScoped, "getVertexScoped");
async function setVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, data) {
 await env.K4_MESH.put(scopedVertexKey(scopePath, id), JSON.stringify(data));
 await registerScope(env, scopePath);
}
__name(setVertexScoped, "setVertexScoped");
async function getEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, v1, v2) {
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(scopedEdgeKey(scopePath, v1, v2));
 const ek = edgeKeySub(v1, v2);
 if (!raw) {
   return {
     vertices: [v1, v2],
     key: ek,
     love: 0,
     pings: [],
     lastActivity: null,
     messageCount: 0
   };
 }
 return JSON.parse(raw);
}
__name(getEdgeScoped, "getEdgeScoped");
async function setEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, v1, v2, data) {
 await env.K4_MESH.put(scopedEdgeKey(scopePath, v1, v2), JSON.stringify(data));
 await registerScope(env, scopePath);
}
__name(setEdgeScoped, "setEdgeScoped");
function isValidVertexScoped(scopePath, id) {
 const { labels } = verticesForScope(scopePath);
 return labels.includes(id);
}
__name(isValidVertexScoped, "isValidVertexScoped");
function isValidEdgeScoped(scopePath, v1, v2) {
 if (!isValidVertexScoped(scopePath, v1) || !isValidVertexScoped(scopePath, v2) || v1 === v2) return false;
 const edges = edgesForScope(scopePath);
 return edges.some(([a, b]) => a === v1 && b === v2 || a === v2 && b === v1);
}
__name(isValidEdgeScoped, "isValidEdgeScoped");
var STALE_MS = 5 * 60 * 1e3;
async function sweepStaleScoped(env, scopePath) {
 const { labels } = verticesForScope(scopePath);
 const now = Date.now();
 const swept = [];
 for (const id of labels) {
   const v = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
   if (v.heartbeat == null) continue;
   if (now - v.heartbeat <= STALE_MS) continue;
   if (v.status !== "online" && v.status !== "away") continue;
   const previousStatus = v.status;
   v.status = "offline";
   await setVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, v);
   swept.push({ id, previousStatus });
 }
 return { swept: swept.length, vertices: swept.map((s) => s.id) };
}
__name(sweepStaleScoped, "sweepStaleScoped");
async function buildMeshPayload(env, scopePath, { connectHub } = {}) {
 const { labels, mode } = verticesForScope(scopePath);
 const edges = edgesForScope(scopePath);
 const vertices = {};
 const edgesOut = {};
 let totalLove = 0;
 let onlineCount = 0;
 let edgesWithRecentPing = 0;
 const activityHorizon = Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1e3;
 await sweepStaleScoped(env, scopePath);
 for (const v of labels) {
   vertices[v] = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, v, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
   totalLove += vertices[v].love || 0;
   if (vertices[v].status === "online" || vertices[v].status === "away") onlineCount += 1;
 }
 for (const [v1, v2] of edges) {
   const key = edgeKeySub(v1, v2);
   edgesOut[key] = await getEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, v1, v2);
   totalLove += edgesOut[key].love || 0;
   const la = edgesOut[key].lastActivity;
   if (la && new Date(la).getTime() > activityHorizon) edgesWithRecentPing += 1;
 }
 const depth = scopeDepth(scopePath);
 return {
   phase: PHASE_SIERPINSKI,
   topology: "K4",
   scope: scopePath === "" ? "family" : scopePath,
   scopeMode: mode,
   depth,
   maxDepth: MAX_DEPTH,
   vertices: 4,
   edges: 6,
   rigidity: "isostatic",
   betti_2: 1,
   mesh: { vertices, edges: edgesOut },
   connect: connectHub || {},
   totalLove,
   onlineCount,
   edgeActivity24h: edgesWithRecentPing,
   staleThresholdMs: STALE_MS,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   signature: "Ca\u2089(PO\u2084)\u2086",
   sierpinski: true
 };
}
__name(buildMeshPayload, "buildMeshPayload");
async function listScopes(env) {
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(registryKey());
 const tags = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : ["root"];
 return { scopes: tags, count: tags.length };
}
__name(listScopes, "listScopes");


// src/index.js
var PHASE = 4;
var STALE_MS2 = 5 * 60 * 1e3;
var CONNECT_HUB = {
 mantra: "Create & Connect",
 weave: "https://p31-phenix.pages.dev",
 viz: "https://k4-cage.trimtab-signal.workers.dev/viz",
 routes: "https://k4-cage.trimtab-signal.workers.dev/api",
 command_center: "https://command-center.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
 carrie: "https://carrie-agent.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
 carrie_public: "https://carrie-wellness.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
 mesh_p2p: "https://p31-mesh.pages.dev",
 vault: "https://p31-vault.pages.dev",
 phenix_wallet: "https://p31-phenix.pages.dev",
 support: "https://phosphorus31.org/support",
 hub: "https://p31ca.org",
 personal_worker: "https://k4-personal.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
 hubs: "https://k4-hubs.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
 hubs_viz: "https://k4-hubs.trimtab-signal.workers.dev/viz",
 hubs_api: "https://k4-hubs.trimtab-signal.workers.dev/api"
};
var VERTICES = ["will", "sj", "wj", "christyn"];
var EDGES = [
 ["will", "sj"],
 // Dad ↔ Son
 ["will", "wj"],
 // Dad ↔ Daughter
 ["will", "christyn"],
 // Co-parent channel
 ["sj", "wj"],
 // Sibling bond
 ["sj", "christyn"],
 // Son ↔ Mom
 ["wj", "christyn"]
 // Daughter ↔ Mom
];
var VERTEX_NAMES = {
 will: "Will",
 sj: "S.J.",
 wj: "W.J.",
 christyn: "Christyn"
};
var CORS_HEADERS = {
 "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
 "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, OPTIONS",
 "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type, Authorization"
};
function edgeKey(v1, v2) {
 return [v1, v2].sort().join("-");
}
__name(edgeKey, "edgeKey");
function json(data, status = 200) {
 return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
   status,
   headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...CORS_HEADERS }
 });
}
__name(json, "json");
function err(message, status = 400) {
 return json({ error: message, timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString() }, status);
}
__name(err, "err");
function isValidVertex(v) {
 return VERTICES.includes(v);
}
__name(isValidVertex, "isValidVertex");
function isValidEdge(v1, v2) {
 return isValidVertex(v1) && isValidVertex(v2) && v1 !== v2;
}
__name(isValidEdge, "isValidEdge");
function isAdmin(request, env) {
 const admin = env && env.ADMIN_TOKEN;
 if (!admin || typeof admin !== "string") return false;
 const auth = request.headers.get("Authorization");
 const url = new URL(request.url);
 const q = url.searchParams.get("token");
 return auth === `Bearer ${admin}` || q === admin;
}
__name(isAdmin, "isAdmin");
async function sha256(message) {
 const msgBuffer = new TextEncoder().encode(message);
 const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest("SHA-256", msgBuffer);
 const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer));
 return hashArray.map((b) => b.toString(16).padStart(2, "0")).join("");
}
__name(sha256, "sha256");
async function appendTelemetry(env, event) {
 const headRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("telemetry:head");
 const head = headRaw ? JSON.parse(headRaw) : { index: 0, hash: "0".repeat(64) };
 const newIndex = head.index + 1;
 const payload = {
   index: newIndex,
   event,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   prevHash: head.hash
 };
 const newHash = await sha256(JSON.stringify(payload) + head.hash);
 payload.hash = newHash;
 await env.K4_MESH.put(`telemetry:${newIndex}`, JSON.stringify(payload));
 await env.K4_MESH.put("telemetry:head", JSON.stringify({ index: newIndex, hash: newHash }));
 return payload;
}
__name(appendTelemetry, "appendTelemetry");
async function getVertex(env, id) {
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(`vertex:${id}`);
 if (!raw) {
   return {
     id,
     name: VERTEX_NAMES[id],
     love: 0,
     status: "offline",
     lastSeen: null,
     heartbeat: null,
     metadata: {}
   };
 }
 return JSON.parse(raw);
}
__name(getVertex, "getVertex");
async function setVertex(env, id, data) {
 await env.K4_MESH.put(`vertex:${id}`, JSON.stringify(data));
}
__name(setVertex, "setVertex");
async function getEdge(env, v1, v2) {
 const key = edgeKey(v1, v2);
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(`edge:${key}`);
 if (!raw) {
   return {
     vertices: [v1, v2],
     key,
     love: 0,
     pings: [],
     lastActivity: null,
     messageCount: 0
   };
 }
 return JSON.parse(raw);
}
__name(getEdge, "getEdge");
async function setEdge(env, v1, v2, data) {
 const key = edgeKey(v1, v2);
 await env.K4_MESH.put(`edge:${key}`, JSON.stringify(data));
}
__name(setEdge, "setEdge");
async function maybeSweepStale(env) {
 const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get("meta:lastSweep");
 const now = Date.now();
 if (!raw) {
   await sweepStaleVertices(env);
   return;
 }
 try {
   const { at } = JSON.parse(raw);
   if (!at || now - new Date(at).getTime() > STALE_MS2) {
     await sweepStaleVertices(env);
   }
 } catch {
   await sweepStaleVertices(env);
 }
}
__name(maybeSweepStale, "maybeSweepStale");
async function sweepStaleVertices(env, sweepTrigger = "lazy_mesh") {
 const now = Date.now();
 const swept = [];
 for (const id of VERTICES) {
   const v = await getVertex(env, id);
   if (v.heartbeat == null) continue;
   if (now - v.heartbeat <= STALE_MS2) continue;
   if (v.status !== "online" && v.status !== "away") continue;
   const previousStatus = v.status;
   v.status = "offline";
   await setVertex(env, id, v);
   swept.push({ id, previousStatus });
   await appendTelemetry(env, {
     type: "stale_sweep",
     vertex: id,
     previousStatus,
     staleMs: now - v.heartbeat,
     sweepTrigger
   });
 }
 await env.K4_MESH.put(
   "meta:lastSweep",
   JSON.stringify({
     at: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
     swept,
     staleThresholdMs: STALE_MS2,
     trigger: sweepTrigger
   })
 );
 return { swept: swept.length, vertices: swept.map((s) => s.id), sweepTrigger };
}
__name(sweepStaleVertices, "sweepStaleVertices");
async function handleMeshState(env) {
 await maybeSweepStale(env);
 const vertices = {};
 const edges = {};
 let totalLove = 0;
 let onlineCount = 0;
 let edgesWithRecentPing = 0;
 const activityHorizon = Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1e3;
 for (const v of VERTICES) {
   vertices[v] = await getVertex(env, v);
   totalLove += vertices[v].love;
   if (vertices[v].status === "online" || vertices[v].status === "away") onlineCount += 1;
 }
 for (const [v1, v2] of EDGES) {
   const key = edgeKey(v1, v2);
   edges[key] = await getEdge(env, v1, v2);
   totalLove += edges[key].love;
   const la = edges[key].lastActivity;
   if (la && new Date(la).getTime() > activityHorizon) edgesWithRecentPing += 1;
 }
 return json({
   phase: PHASE,
   sierpinski: { maxDepth: MAX_DEPTH, phaseNested: PHASE_SIERPINSKI },
   topology: "K4",
   vertices: 4,
   edges: 6,
   rigidity: "isostatic",
   betti_2: 1,
   mesh: { vertices, edges },
   connect: CONNECT_HUB,
   totalLove,
   onlineCount,
   edgeActivity24h: edgesWithRecentPing,
   staleThresholdMs: STALE_MS2,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   signature: "Ca\u2089(PO\u2084)\u2086"
 });
}
__name(handleMeshState, "handleMeshState");
async function handleMeta(env) {
 const lastSweepRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("meta:lastSweep");
 return json({
   phase: PHASE,
   workerVersion: "2.2.0",
   staleThresholdMs: STALE_MS2,
   sweepTrigger: "lazy_on_mesh_read",
   lastSweep: lastSweepRaw ? JSON.parse(lastSweepRaw) : null
 });
}
__name(handleMeta, "handleMeta");
async function handleRouteIndex() {
 return json({
   service: "k4-cage",
   phase: PHASE,
   workerVersion: "2.2.0",
   routes: [
     { method: "GET", path: "/", desc: "HTML API reference" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/viz", desc: "Live SVG tetrahedron + mesh poll" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api", desc: "This route index (JSON)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/mesh", desc: "Full mesh + connect hub URLs + lazy sweep if due" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/meta", desc: "Worker meta + lastSweep" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/health", desc: "Liveness + features" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/vertex/:id", desc: "Vertex + incident edges" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/presence/:id", desc: "Heartbeat / status" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/edge/:v1/:v2", desc: "Edge state" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/ping/:from/:to", desc: "LOVE ping along edge" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/telemetry", desc: "Telemetry chain (read)" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/telemetry", desc: "Append telemetry (admin)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/admin/dashboard", desc: "Full dashboard (admin)" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/admin/sweep", desc: "Force stale sweep (admin)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/v4/mesh", desc: "Scoped K\u2084 mesh (query ?scope= \u2014 personal | will | will/a/... depth\u22644)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/v4/scopes", desc: "Registered scope paths (KV registry)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/v4/vertex/:id", desc: "Vertex in scope (?scope=)" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/v4/presence/:id", desc: "Presence (?scope=)" },
     { method: "POST", path: "/api/v4/ping/:from/:to", desc: "Ping edge (?scope=)" },
     { method: "GET", path: "/api/v4/health", desc: "V4 capability probe" }
   ]
 });
}
__name(handleRouteIndex, "handleRouteIndex");
async function handleAdminSweep(env) {
 const result = await sweepStaleVertices(env, "admin_post");
 const metaRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("meta:lastSweep");
 return json({
   ok: true,
   phase: PHASE,
   sweptCount: result.swept,
   vertexIds: result.vertices,
   sweepTrigger: result.sweepTrigger,
   lastSweep: metaRaw ? JSON.parse(metaRaw) : null,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
 });
}
__name(handleAdminSweep, "handleAdminSweep");
function scopeFromRequest(request) {
 const url = new URL(request.url);
 const raw = url.searchParams.get("scope");
 if (raw == null || raw === "") return "";
 return normalizeScopePath(raw);
}
__name(scopeFromRequest, "scopeFromRequest");
async function handleV4Mesh(env, request) {
 const path = scopeFromRequest(request);
 if (path === null) return err("Invalid scope path", 400);
 return json(await buildMeshPayload(env, path, { connectHub: CONNECT_HUB }));
}
__name(handleV4Mesh, "handleV4Mesh");
async function handleV4Presence(env, request, id) {
 const scopePath = scopeFromRequest(request);
 if (scopePath === null) return err("Invalid scope path", 400);
 if (!isValidVertexScoped(scopePath, id)) return err("Unknown vertex for this scope", 400);
 const body = await request.json().catch(() => ({}));
 const vertex = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
 vertex.status = body.status || "online";
 vertex.lastSeen = (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString();
 vertex.heartbeat = Date.now();
 if (body.metadata) vertex.metadata = { ...vertex.metadata, ...body.metadata };
 await setVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, vertex);
 await appendTelemetry(env, {
   type: "presence",
   scope: scopePath || "family",
   vertex: id,
   status: vertex.status
 });
 return json({ vertex, recorded: true, scope: scopePath || "family" });
}
__name(handleV4Presence, "handleV4Presence");
async function handleV4Ping(env, request, from, to) {
 const scopePath = scopeFromRequest(request);
 if (scopePath === null) return err("Invalid scope path", 400);
 if (!isValidEdgeScoped(scopePath, from, to)) return err("Invalid edge for this scope", 400);
 const body = await request.json().catch(() => ({}));
 const emoji = body.emoji || "\u{1F49A}";
 const edge = await getEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, from, to);
 const fromVertex = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, from, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
 const toVertex = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, to, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
 const ping = {
   from,
   to,
   emoji,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   id: crypto.randomUUID()
 };
 edge.pings = [ping, ...edge.pings || []].slice(0, 50);
 edge.love = (edge.love || 0) + 1;
 edge.lastActivity = ping.timestamp;
 edge.messageCount = (edge.messageCount || 0) + 1;
 fromVertex.love = (fromVertex.love || 0) + 1;
 toVertex.love = (toVertex.love || 0) + 1;
 await setEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, from, to, edge);
 await setVertexScoped(env, scopePath, from, fromVertex);
 await setVertexScoped(env, scopePath, to, toVertex);
 const telemetry = await appendTelemetry(env, {
   type: "ping",
   scope: scopePath || "family",
   edge: edgeKeySub(from, to),
   from,
   to,
   emoji,
   pingId: ping.id
 });
 return json({
   ping,
   edge: { love: edge.love, lastActivity: edge.lastActivity },
   fromLove: fromVertex.love,
   toLove: toVertex.love,
   scope: scopePath || "family",
   telemetry: { index: telemetry.index, hash: telemetry.hash }
 });
}
__name(handleV4Ping, "handleV4Ping");
async function handleV4VertexGet(env, request, id) {
 const scopePath = scopeFromRequest(request);
 if (scopePath === null) return err("Invalid scope path", 400);
 if (!isValidVertexScoped(scopePath, id)) return err("Unknown vertex for this scope", 400);
 const vertex = await getVertexScoped(env, scopePath, id, { legacyFamily: scopePath === "" });
 const connectedEdges = {};
 for (const [v1, v2] of edgesForScope(scopePath)) {
   if (v1 === id || v2 === id) {
     const key = edgeKeySub(v1, v2);
     connectedEdges[key] = await getEdgeScoped(env, scopePath, v1, v2);
   }
 }
 return json({ vertex, edges: connectedEdges, scope: scopePath || "family" });
}
__name(handleV4VertexGet, "handleV4VertexGet");
function handleV4Health() {
 return json({
   ok: true,
   phase: PHASE,
   v4: true,
   nestedK4: true,
   maxDepth: MAX_DEPTH,
   phaseNested: PHASE_SIERPINSKI,
   scopeExamples: ["", "personal", "will", "will/a", "will/a/b", "will/a/b/c", "will/a/b/c/d"],
   query: "Use ?scope= on /api/v4/* (encode slashes as %2F)",
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
 });
}
__name(handleV4Health, "handleV4Health");
async function handleVertexGet(env, id) {
 if (!isValidVertex(id)) return err(`Unknown vertex: ${id}. Valid: ${VERTICES.join(", ")}`);
 const vertex = await getVertex(env, id);
 const connectedEdges = {};
 for (const [v1, v2] of EDGES) {
   if (v1 === id || v2 === id) {
     const key = edgeKey(v1, v2);
     connectedEdges[key] = await getEdge(env, v1, v2);
   }
 }
 return json({ vertex, edges: connectedEdges });
}
__name(handleVertexGet, "handleVertexGet");
async function handlePresence(env, request, id) {
 if (!isValidVertex(id)) return err(`Unknown vertex: ${id}`);
 const body = await request.json().catch(() => ({}));
 const vertex = await getVertex(env, id);
 vertex.status = body.status || "online";
 vertex.lastSeen = (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString();
 vertex.heartbeat = Date.now();
 if (body.metadata) vertex.metadata = { ...vertex.metadata, ...body.metadata };
 await setVertex(env, id, vertex);
 await appendTelemetry(env, {
   type: "presence",
   vertex: id,
   status: vertex.status
 });
 return json({ vertex, recorded: true });
}
__name(handlePresence, "handlePresence");
async function handlePing(env, request, from, to) {
 if (!isValidEdge(from, to)) return err(`Invalid edge: ${from} \u2194 ${to}`);
 const body = await request.json().catch(() => ({}));
 const emoji = body.emoji || "\u{1F49A}";
 const edge = await getEdge(env, from, to);
 const fromVertex = await getVertex(env, from);
 const toVertex = await getVertex(env, to);
 const ping = {
   from,
   to,
   emoji,
   timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   id: crypto.randomUUID()
 };
 edge.pings = [ping, ...edge.pings].slice(0, 50);
 edge.love += 1;
 edge.lastActivity = ping.timestamp;
 edge.messageCount += 1;
 fromVertex.love += 1;
 toVertex.love += 1;
 await setEdge(env, from, to, edge);
 await setVertex(env, from, fromVertex);
 await setVertex(env, to, toVertex);
 const telemetry = await appendTelemetry(env, {
   type: "ping",
   edge: edgeKey(from, to),
   from,
   to,
   emoji,
   pingId: ping.id
 });
 return json({
   ping,
   edge: { love: edge.love, lastActivity: edge.lastActivity },
   fromLove: fromVertex.love,
   toLove: toVertex.love,
   telemetry: { index: telemetry.index, hash: telemetry.hash }
 });
}
__name(handlePing, "handlePing");
async function handleEdgeGet(env, v1, v2) {
 if (!isValidEdge(v1, v2)) return err(`Invalid edge: ${v1} \u2194 ${v2}`);
 return json(await getEdge(env, v1, v2));
}
__name(handleEdgeGet, "handleEdgeGet");
async function handleTelemetryGet(env, request) {
 const url = new URL(request.url);
 const count = Math.min(parseInt(url.searchParams.get("count") || "20"), 100);
 const headRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("telemetry:head");
 if (!headRaw) return json({ chain: [], head: null, verified: true });
 const head = JSON.parse(headRaw);
 const chain = [];
 for (let i = head.index; i > Math.max(0, head.index - count); i--) {
   const raw = await env.K4_MESH.get(`telemetry:${i}`);
   if (raw) chain.push(JSON.parse(raw));
 }
 let verified = true;
 for (let i = 0; i < chain.length - 1; i++) {
   if (chain[i].prevHash !== chain[i + 1].hash) {
     verified = false;
     break;
   }
 }
 return json({
   chain,
   head,
   verified,
   chainLength: head.index,
   standard: "WCD-46 SHA-256 Chain-of-Custody",
   compliance: ["O.C.G.A. \xA7 24-9-901", "O.C.G.A. \xA7 24-9-902", "O.C.G.A. \xA7 24-7-702"]
 });
}
__name(handleTelemetryGet, "handleTelemetryGet");
async function handleTelemetryPost(env, request) {
 const body = await request.json().catch(() => null);
 if (!body || !body.event) return err("Missing event payload");
 const telemetry = await appendTelemetry(env, body.event);
 return json({ recorded: true, telemetry });
}
__name(handleTelemetryPost, "handleTelemetryPost");
async function handleAdminDashboard(env) {
 const mesh = {};
 for (const v of VERTICES) {
   mesh[v] = await getVertex(env, v);
 }
 const edgeStates = {};
 for (const [v1, v2] of EDGES) {
   const key = edgeKey(v1, v2);
   edgeStates[key] = await getEdge(env, v1, v2);
 }
 const headRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("telemetry:head");
 const head = headRaw ? JSON.parse(headRaw) : { index: 0, hash: null };
 const lastSweepRaw = await env.K4_MESH.get("meta:lastSweep");
 return json({
   phase: PHASE,
   operator: "William R. Johnson",
   org: "P31 Labs, Inc.",
   ein: "42-1888158",
   lastSweep: lastSweepRaw ? JSON.parse(lastSweepRaw) : null,
   staleThresholdMs: STALE_MS2,
   topology: {
     type: "K\u2084 Complete Graph",
     vertices: 4,
     edges: 6,
     rigidity: "Isostatic (Maxwell: E = 3V - 6 \u2192 6 = 6)",
     betti_2: 1,
     enclosure: "Volumetric"
   },
   vertices: mesh,
   edges: edgeStates,
   telemetry: {
     chainLength: head.index,
     headHash: head.hash,
     standard: "WCD-46",
     compliance: "Daubert"
   },
   infrastructure: {
     worker: "k4-cage.trimtab-signal.workers.dev",
     kv: "K4_MESH",
     architecture: "Single worker, zero Wye dependency",
     sweep: "lazy on GET /api/mesh when last sweep > 5m ago"
   },
   generated: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
 });
}
__name(handleAdminDashboard, "handleAdminDashboard");
function statusPage() {
 return new Response(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
 <meta charset="UTF-8">
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
 <title>K\u2084 Cage \u2014 P31 Labs</title>
 <style>
   * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
   body {
     background: #0a0a0a; color: #e0e0e0;
     font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
     padding: 2rem; min-height: 100vh;
   }
   .header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
   .header h1 {
     font-size: 2rem; color: #ff6b4a;
     text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(255,107,74,0.3);
   }
   .header .sub { color: #888; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
   .mantra { color: #f472b6; font-size: 1.15rem; margin-top: 1rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
   .live { color: #4ecdc4; font-size: 0.85rem; margin-top: 0.75rem; min-height: 1.25em; }
   .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; }
   .card {
     background: #111; border: 1px solid #222; border-radius: 8px;
     padding: 1rem; transition: border-color 0.3s;
   }
   .card:hover { border-color: #ff6b4a; }
   .card h3 { color: #ff6b4a; font-size: 0.9rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
   .endpoint { color: #4ecdc4; font-size: 0.8rem; margin: 0.25rem 0; }
   .meta { color: #666; font-size: 0.75rem; }
   @media (max-width: 600px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
 </style>
</head>
<body>
 <div class="header">
   <h1>K\u2084 CAGE</h1>
   <div class="sub">P31 Labs, Inc. | One Worker. Four Vertices. Six Edges.</div>
   <div class="sub">Ca\u2089(PO\u2084)\u2086 \u2014 The Posner Molecule as Infrastructure</div>
   <div class="mantra">Create &amp; Connect &#x2665;</div>
   <div id="live" class="live">Connecting to mesh&#8230;</div>
 </div>
   <div class="grid">
   <div class="card">
     <h3>PHASE 4</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api</div>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/v4/mesh?scope=\u2026</div>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /viz</div>
     <div class="endpoint">POST /api/admin/sweep</div>
     <div class="meta">Sierpi\u0144ski scopes \xB7 route index \xB7 viz \xB7 sweep (admin)</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>MESH STATE</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/mesh</div>
     <div class="meta">Full topology: all vertices + edges + LOVE</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>VERTEX</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/vertex/:id</div>
     <div class="endpoint">POST /api/presence/:id</div>
     <div class="meta">will | sj | wj | christyn</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>EDGES</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/edge/:v1/:v2</div>
     <div class="endpoint">POST /api/ping/:from/:to</div>
     <div class="meta">6 edges, each carrying pings + LOVE</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>TELEMETRY (WCD-46)</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/telemetry</div>
     <div class="endpoint">POST /api/telemetry</div>
     <div class="meta">SHA-256 chain-of-custody, Daubert-grade</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>ADMIN</h3>
     <div class="endpoint">GET /api/admin/dashboard?token=***</div>
     <div class="meta">Full mesh overview, chain stats</div>
   </div>
   <div class="card">
     <h3>TOPOLOGY</h3>
     <div class="meta">K\u2084 = 4 vertices, 6 edges</div>
     <div class="meta">Maxwell rigidity: E = 3V - 6 \u2192 6 = 6 \u2713</div>
     <div class="meta">\u03B2\u2082 = 1 (volumetric enclosure) \u2713</div>
     <div class="meta">Isostatic: minimum rigid in \u211D\xB3 \u2713</div>
   </div>
 </div>
 <script>
 (function(){
   var el = document.getElementById('live');
   fetch('/api/mesh', { credentials: 'omit' })
     .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
     .then(function(d){
       var love = typeof d.totalLove === 'number' ? d.totalLove : 0;
       var t = d.timestamp ? new Date(d.timestamp).toLocaleString() : '';
       el.textContent = 'Connected \u2014 ' + love + ' LOVE \u2014 ' + (t || 'live');
     })
     .catch(function(){ el.textContent = 'Mesh unreachable'; });
 })();
 <\/script>
</body>
</html>`, {
   headers: { "Content-Type": "text/html", ...CORS_HEADERS }
 });
}
__name(statusPage, "statusPage");
function vizPage() {
 return new Response(`<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
 <meta charset="UTF-8">
 <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
 <title>K\u2084 Live \u2014 Phase 3</title>
 <style>
   * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
   body {
     background: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, #1a1a2e 0%, #0a0a0a 55%);
     color: #e0e0e0;
     font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
     min-height: 100vh;
     padding: 1.25rem;
   }
   h1 {
     font-size: 1.35rem;
     color: #ff6b4a;
     text-align: center;
     margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
   }
   .sub { text-align: center; color: #64748b; font-size: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
   .badge {
     display: inline-block;
     background: #22c55e22;
     color: #4ade80;
     font-size: 0.65rem;
     padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
     border-radius: 4px;
     margin-left: 0.35rem;
     vertical-align: middle;
   }
   .stats {
     display: flex;
     flex-wrap: wrap;
     gap: 0.75rem;
     justify-content: center;
     margin-bottom: 1rem;
     font-size: 0.8rem;
     color: #94a3b8;
   }
   .stats strong { color: #4ecdc4; }
   .wrap { max-width: 420px; margin: 0 auto; }
   svg { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,107,74,0.15)); }
   .edge { stroke: #334155; stroke-width: 1.5; }
   .node { stroke: #0f172a; stroke-width: 1.5; }
   .lbl { fill: #94a3b8; font-size: 8px; font-family: inherit; }
   .legend { margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #64748b; text-align: center; line-height: 1.6; }
   .legend span { display: inline-block; margin: 0 0.5rem; }
   .dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 4px; vertical-align: -1px; }
   .edges-panel {
     margin-top: 1rem;
     background: #111827;
     border: 1px solid #1e293b;
     border-radius: 8px;
     padding: 0.75rem;
     font-size: 0.72rem;
     color: #94a3b8;
   }
   .edges-panel h3 { color: #ff6b4a; font-size: 0.7rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
   .edge-row { padding: 0.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e293b; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; }
   .edge-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
   #err { color: #f87171; text-align: center; font-size: 0.75rem; min-height: 1.2em; }
   a.back { display: block; text-align: center; margin-top: 1rem; color: #4ecdc4; font-size: 0.75rem; }
 </style>
</head>
<body>
 <div class="wrap">
   <h1>K\u2084 Live <span class="badge">Phase 4</span></h1>
   <div class="sub">Vertices pulse by presence \xB7 Edges hold LOVE</div>
   <div class="stats" id="stats">
     <span>LOVE <strong id="love">\u2014</strong></span>
     <span>Online <strong id="on">\u2014</strong>/4</span>
     <span>Edges 24h <strong id="e24">\u2014</strong>/6</span>
   </div>
   <div id="err"></div>
   <svg viewBox="0 0 200 130" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="K4 graph">
     <line class="edge" x1="100" y1="12" x2="32" y2="102"/>
     <line class="edge" x1="100" y1="12" x2="168" y2="102"/>
     <line class="edge" x1="100" y1="12" x2="100" y2="78"/>
     <line class="edge" x1="32" y1="102" x2="168" y2="102"/>
     <line class="edge" x1="32" y1="102" x2="100" y2="78"/>
     <line class="edge" x1="168" y1="102" x2="100" y2="78"/>
     <circle class="node" id="v-will" cx="100" cy="12" r="7" fill="#475569"/>
     <circle class="node" id="v-sj" cx="32" cy="102" r="7" fill="#475569"/>
     <circle class="node" id="v-wj" cx="168" cy="102" r="7" fill="#475569"/>
     <circle class="node" id="v-christyn" cx="100" cy="78" r="7" fill="#475569"/>
     <text class="lbl" x="100" y="8" text-anchor="middle">Will</text>
     <text class="lbl" x="32" y="118" text-anchor="middle">S.J.</text>
     <text class="lbl" x="168" y="118" text-anchor="middle">W.J.</text>
     <text class="lbl" x="100" y="94" text-anchor="middle">Christyn</text>
   </svg>
   <div class="legend">
     <span><i class="dot" style="background:#22c55e"></i>online</span>
     <span><i class="dot" style="background:#eab308"></i>away</span>
     <span><i class="dot" style="background:#475569"></i>offline</span>
   </div>
   <div class="edges-panel" id="edges"></div>
   <a class="back" href="/">API reference</a>
 </div>
 <script>
 (function(){
   var map = { will: 'v-will', sj: 'v-sj', wj: 'v-wj', christyn: 'v-christyn' };
   function fillColor(st) {
     if (st === 'online') return '#22c55e';
     if (st === 'away') return '#eab308';
     return '#475569';
   }
   function tick() {
     fetch('/api/mesh', { cache: 'no-store' })
       .then(function(r){ return r.json(); })
       .then(function(d){
         document.getElementById('err').textContent = '';
         document.getElementById('love').textContent = d.totalLove != null ? d.totalLove : '0';
         document.getElementById('on').textContent = d.onlineCount != null ? d.onlineCount : '0';
         document.getElementById('e24').textContent = d.edgeActivity24h != null ? d.edgeActivity24h : '0';
         var mv = d.mesh && d.mesh.vertices;
         if (!mv) return;
         Object.keys(map).forEach(function(id) {
           var el = document.getElementById(map[id]);
           var vtx = mv[id];
           if (el && vtx) el.setAttribute('fill', fillColor(vtx.status));
         });
         var edges = d.mesh.edges;
         var html = '<h3>Edges (LOVE)</h3>';
         if (edges) {
           Object.keys(edges).sort().forEach(function(k) {
             var e = edges[k];
             var love = e.love != null ? e.love : 0;
             var la = e.lastActivity ? '<span style="color:#64748b">' + e.lastActivity.slice(0,16) + '</span>' : '\u2014';
             html += '<div class="edge-row"><span>' + k.replace(/-/g,' \u2194 ') + '</span><span>' + love + ' \xB7 ' + la + '</span></div>';
           });
         }
         document.getElementById('edges').innerHTML = html;
       })
       .catch(function(e){ document.getElementById('err').textContent = 'Mesh unreachable'; });
   }
   tick();
   setInterval(tick, 4000);
 })();
 <\/script>
</body>
</html>`, {
   headers: { "Content-Type": "text/html", ...CORS_HEADERS }
 });
}
__name(vizPage, "vizPage");
var index_default = {
 async fetch(request, env) {
   if (request.method === "OPTIONS") {
     return new Response(null, { headers: CORS_HEADERS });
   }
   const url = new URL(request.url);
   const path = url.pathname;
   const method = request.method;
   try {
     if (path === "/" || path === "") return statusPage();
     if (path === "/viz" || path === "/viz/") return vizPage();
     if (path === "/api" && method === "GET") return handleRouteIndex();
     if (path === "/api/mesh" && method === "GET") return await handleMeshState(env);
     if (path === "/api/meta" && method === "GET") return await handleMeta(env);
     const vertexMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/vertex\/(\w+)$/);
     if (vertexMatch && method === "GET") return await handleVertexGet(env, vertexMatch[1]);
     const presenceMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/presence\/(\w+)$/);
     if (presenceMatch && method === "POST") return await handlePresence(env, request, presenceMatch[1]);
     const pingMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/ping\/(\w+)\/(\w+)$/);
     if (pingMatch && method === "POST") return await handlePing(env, request, pingMatch[1], pingMatch[2]);
     const edgeMatch = path.match(/^\/api\/edge\/(\w+)\/(\w+)$/);
     if (edgeMatch && method === "GET") return await handleEdgeGet(env, edgeMatch[1], edgeMatch[2]);
     if (path === "/api/telemetry" && method === "GET") return await handleTelemetryGet(env, request);
     if (path === "/api/telemetry" && method === "POST") {
       if (!isAdmin(request, env)) return err("Unauthorized", 401);
       return await handleTelemetryPost(env, request);
     }
     if (path === "/api/admin/dashboard") {
       if (!isAdmin(request, env)) return err("Unauthorized", 401);
       return await handleAdminDashboard(env);
     }
     if (path === "/api/admin/sweep" && method === "POST") {
       if (!isAdmin(request, env)) return err("Unauthorized", 401);
       return await handleAdminSweep(env);
     }
     if (path === "/api/v4/mesh" && method === "GET") return await handleV4Mesh(env, request);
     if (path === "/api/v4/scopes" && method === "GET") return json(await listScopes(env));
     if (path === "/api/v4/health" && method === "GET") return handleV4Health();
     const v4vx = path.match(/^\/api\/v4\/vertex\/(\w+)$/);
     if (v4vx && method === "GET") return await handleV4VertexGet(env, request, v4vx[1]);
     const v4pr = path.match(/^\/api\/v4\/presence\/(\w+)$/);
     if (v4pr && method === "POST") return await handleV4Presence(env, request, v4pr[1]);
     const v4pg = path.match(/^\/api\/v4\/ping\/(\w+)\/(\w+)$/);
     if (v4pg && method === "POST") return await handleV4Ping(env, request, v4pg[1], v4pg[2]);
     if (path === "/api/health") {
       return json({
         status: "rigid",
         topology: "K4",
         phase: PHASE,
         mantra: "Create & Connect",
         features: [
           "lazy_stale_sweep",
           "viz",
           "mesh_enriched",
           "mesh_connect_hub",
           "meta",
           "route_index",
           "admin_sweep",
           "v4_sierpinski_scopes",
           "nested_k4_depth_gt_3"
         ],
         uptime: Date.now()
       });
     }
     return err("Not found. Try GET /api, /api/mesh, or /viz", 404);
   } catch (e) {
     return err(`Internal error: ${e.message}`, 500);
   }
 }
};
export {
 index_default as default
};
//# sourceMappingURL=index.js.map


P31-status-agent

var __defProp = Object.defineProperty;
var __name = (target, value) => __defProp(target, "name", { value, configurable: true });


// src/index.js
function getStatus() {
 return {
   lastUpdated: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
   infrastructure: [
     { name: "Command Center", url: "https://command-center.trimtab-signal.workers.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "P31 Mesh", url: "https://a7e99914.p31-pwa.pages.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "Carrie Agent", url: "https://carrie-agent.trimtab-signal.workers.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "Carrie (public)", url: "https://carrie-wellness.trimtab-signal.workers.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "Telemetry (WCD-46)", url: "https://p31-telemetry.trimtab-signal.workers.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "Genesis Gate", url: "https://genesis-gate.trimtab-signal.workers.dev", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "BONDING", url: "https://bonding.p31ca.org", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "P31 Portal", url: "https://p31ca.org", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "P31.org", url: "https://phosphorus31.org", status: "LIVE" },
     { name: "Larmor", url: "https://p31ca.org/larmor", status: "LIVE" }
   ],
   legal: {
     caseNumber: "2025CV936",
     evictionStatus: "CONTESTED",
     psychEval: "COMPLETED Mar 24",
     discoveryFiled: "Mar 26",
     custodyStatus: "2 calls/week supervised"
   },
   financial: {
     operatingBuffer: 105,
     housingGrant: "ESG opens Apr 13",
     grantPipeline: "550K+ pending",
     c3Status: "filed Apr 3 - pending IRS"
   },
   workstreams: [
     { cwp: "CWP-2026-011", status: "ACTIVE", action: "CogPass sync" },
     { cwp: "CWP-2026-012", status: "ACTIVE", action: "ESG grant apply", due: "Apr 15" },
     { cwp: "CWP-2026-013", status: "ACTIVE", action: "Community growth", due: "May 19" },
     { cwp: "CWP-2026-014", status: "COMPLETE", action: "Carrie Agent deployed" },
     { cwp: "CWP-2026-015", status: "COMPLETE", action: "Command Center + Mesh deployed" }
   ],
   nodeZero: {
     status: "DEBUGGING",
     display: "INIT CONFIRMED",
     rootCause: "Missing lv_init() before driver",
     spiMode: 0,
     qspiClock: "40MHz"
   },
   keyDates: [
     { date: "2026-04-13", event: "ESG portal OPENS" },
     { date: "2026-04-15", event: "ESG DEADLINE" },
     { date: "2026-04-30", event: "GA Tech Summit" },
     { date: "2026-05-19", event: "Neurotech Frontiers Summit" },
     { date: "2026-09-30", event: "FERS disability deadline" }
   ],
   agents: [
     { name: "Sonnet", role: "Mechanic", allocation: "80%", status: "ACTIVE" },
     { name: "Gemini", role: "Narrator", allocation: "15%", status: "AVAILABLE" },
     { name: "DeepSeek", role: "Firmware", allocation: "4%", status: "SUSPENDED" },
     { name: "Opus", role: "Architect", allocation: "1%", status: "AVAILABLE" },
     { name: "KwaiPilot", role: "FW Execution", allocation: "ON-DEMAND", status: "AVAILABLE" }
   ]
 };
}
__name(getStatus, "getStatus");
var src_default = {
 async fetch(request) {
   const url = new URL(request.url);
   if (url.pathname === "/status" || url.pathname === "/") {
     return new Response(JSON.stringify(getStatus(), null, 2), {
       headers: {
         "content-type": "application/json",
         "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*"
       }
     });
   }
   if (url.pathname === "/health") {
     return new Response(JSON.stringify({
       service: "p31-status-agent",
       status: "ok",
       timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
     }), {
       headers: { "content-type": "application/json" }
     });
   }
   return new Response("Not Found", { status: 404 });
 }
};
export {
 src_default as default
};
